mapper.select:
SELECT factory_line_id AS factoryLineId, factory_line_code AS factoryLineCode, factory_line_name AS factoryLineName FROM factory_line WHERE is_deleted = false
AND ( factory_line_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR factory_line_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY factory_line_id DESC
SELECT factory_line_id AS factoryLineId, factory_line_code AS factoryLineCode, factory_line_name AS factoryLineName FROM factory_line WHERE factory_line_id = #{factoryLineId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT COUNT(e.equipment_id) AS totalEquipmentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS operatingEquipmentCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(e.equipment_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(e.equipment_id) * 100, 2) END AS operationRate FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON ep.equipment_process_id = e.equipment_process_id WHERE fl.factory_line_id = #{factoryLineId} AND fl.is_deleted = false
SELECT factory_line_id FROM factory_line WHERE factory_line_code = #{factoryLineCode} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
